header.title: ZerithDB
header.subtitle: Local-first, peer-to-peer, CRDT-powered browser-native database platform

hero.title: The browser is the server
hero.description: Local-first, peer-to-peer, CRDT-powered database. Build full-stack apps with ZERO backend infrastructure.

localFirst.title: Local-First
localFirst.description: Data lives in your browser. Works offline. Syncs when online.

crdt.title: CRDT-Powered
crdt.description: Conflict-free replicated data types for automatic merging.

sync.title: Real-time Sync
sync.description: Changes propagate instantly across all connected peers.

secure.title: End-to-End Encryption
secure.description: Built-in encryption for all data in transit and at rest.

performance.title: Lightning Fast
performance.description: Millisecond response times with local-first architecture.
